title: October 2025 Transaction Data
body: "Please note this data shows what HM Land Registry has been able to process during the time period covered and is not necessarily a reflection of market activity.  In October:     HM Land Registry completed over 2,089,280 applications to change or query the Land Register   The South East topped the table of regional applications with 472,423   HM Land Registry completed 2,089,280 applications in October compared with 1,983,030 in September 2025 and 2,140,187 last October 2024, of which:     339,881 were applications for register updates compared with 325,589 in September   1,178,185 were applications for an official copy of a register compared with 1,114,585 in September   228,940 were search and hold queries (official searches) compared with 223,170 in September   90,427 were transactions for value compared with 86,570 in September   18,714 were postal applications from non-account holders compared with 15,389 in September    Applications by region and country      Region/country August applications September applications October applications     South East 394,824 445,564 472,423   Greater London 318,096 369,405 399,205   North West 201,180 222,201 231,852   South West 170,973 195,041 200,983   West Midlands 149,516 169,672 178,659   Yorkshire and the Humber 139,516 157,342 165,374   East Midlands 129,634 148,138 153,087   North 88,145 99,051 104,194   East Anglia 75,440 83,853 88,974   Isles of Scilly 83 96 61   Wales 80,599 92,530 94,319   England and Wales (not assigned) 112 137 149   Total 1,748,118 1,983,030 2,089,280     Top 5 local authority areas   October 2025 applications     Top 5 Local authority areas October applications     Birmingham 30,638   City of Westminster 28,075   Hounslow 27,402   Leeds 23,474   North Yorkshire 23,352     Top 5 customers   October 2025 applications     Top 5 customers October applications     InfoTrack Limited 233,380   Enact 36,912   Orbital Witness Limited 33,242   O’Neill Patient 32,874   Landmark Information Group Ltd 29,399     Access the full dataset on our Use land and property data service.  Next publication   Transaction Data is published on the 15th working day of each month. The November 2025 data will be published at 11am on Friday 19 December 2025. "
